headlineSummary: HN sentiment was mixed and close, with OpenAI getting a modest positive note about its technical leadership [E1], while Anthropic drew one praise for Claude Code and one criticism about Claude’s style, leaving it balanced on limited evidence [E2][E3].

ranking.summary: Anthropic had mixed neutral sentiment on limited evidence: one comment praised Claude Code as key to the work, while another criticized Claude’s tendency to go on about surface-level details [E2][E3].
OpenAI trended neutral to mildly positive on limited evidence, with a comment praising the company’s young technical leadership and key ChatGPT decisionmakers [E1].

evidence.excerpt: One really impressive thing about OpenAI is that most of the people running the company (on the technical side, at least) are under 35. Many of the important decisionmakers behind chatGPT are under 30.

annotations.rationale: The excerpt explicitly says an 'impressive thing' about OpenAI, praising its young technical leadership and ChatGPT decisionmakers.

evidence.excerpt: Claude Code was key to his work.

annotations.rationale: The comment directly credits Claude Code as instrumental to accomplishing the work, indicating approval of its usefulness.

evidence.excerpt: Since Claude goes on and on about surface, now everyone is using it.

annotations.rationale: The commenter criticizes Claude's characteristic wording style as overused and annoying, a mild negative judgment about the model's outputs.
